description: Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning and Data careers.

careers.name: Data Scientist
careers.overview: Data Scientist is a data and artificial intelligence career focused on using data, algorithms and models to solve real-world problems.
careers.whyChoose: Data Scientist offers high-growth field, strong salaries, future-ready skills and opportunities across nearly every industry.
careers.eligibility: Class 12 with Mathematics is preferred; engineering, statistics, computer science or analytics degrees are common.
careers.educationPath: Class 12 with Mathematics -> Degree in CS/Data/Stats/Engineering -> Projects -> Internship -> AI/Data role.
careers.workEnvironment: Technology companies, analytics teams, research labs, startups, product companies and consulting firms.
careers.futureScope: Excellent due to AI adoption, automation, data-driven decisions and intelligent products.
careers.aiImpact: AI is the core of this field; professionals who understand data, models and deployment will remain in strong demand.
